title: nadad #5074
definition:
1) to retreat, flee, depart, move, wander abroad, stray, flutter
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to retreat, flee
        1a2) to flee, depart
        1a3) to wander, stray
        1a4) to flutter (of birds)
    1b) (Poal) to flee away, be chased
    1c) (Hiphil) to chase away
    1d) (Hophal) to be chased away
    1e) (Hithpolel) to flee away
nasbUsage:
